name: WTTJ Job Alerts → Google Sheets v3 (GraphQL)

gmailOAuth2.name: Gmail OAuth2 — configure in n8n UI

parameters.jsonBody: {"operationName":"JobRecommendations","variables":{"ignoreSubfunctions":false},"query":"query JobRecommendations($ignoreSubfunctions: Boolean) { currentUser { id jobRecommendations(ignoreSubfunctions: $ignoreSubfunctions) { id job { id externalId title subtitle company { id name faviconPath } } } } }"}

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets OAuth2 — configure in n8n UI

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ operationName: 'JobDetails', variables: { externalId: $json.externalId, currency: 'USD' }, query: 'query JobDetails($externalId: ID!, $currency: Currency!) { publicJob(externalId: $externalId) { id externalId title subtitle salaryRange { minAmount maxAmount currency } remoteOnly formattedLocationPreferences(groupRemote: true) { name matchesUserPreference } function { value } subFunction { value } minYearsExperienceRequired maxYearsExperienceRequired technologiesUsed { value } originalUrl insertedAt validUntil company { name shortDescription numberEmployees size { value } sectorTags { value } totalFunding(currency: $currency) { amount currency } } } }' }) }}

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets OAuth2 — configure in n8n UI
